headline: Millrose (MRP) 2025 Net Income Hits $2.44 Per Share on $9.2B Portfolio Growth
summary: Millrose (NYSE:MRP) is one of the cheap new stocks to buy now. On February 26, Millrose Properties reported results for its inaugural year, achieving a full-year net income of $2.44 per share and an Adjusted Funds From Operations/AFFO of $2.58 per share. The company exceeded its financial targets, finishing Q4 with an AFFO run rate […]

headline: Home sellers are relisting properties at fastest pace in a decade, but spring supply is still low
summary: Frustrated sellers who pulled homes off the market last fall are now re-listing them at a quick pace, thanks to lower mortgage rates, but supply is still low.

raw.headline: Home sellers are relisting properties at fastest pace in a decade, but spring supply is still low
raw.summary: Frustrated sellers who pulled homes off the market last fall are now re-listing them at a quick pace, thanks to lower mortgage rates, but supply is still low.

headline: Trump, Senate Democrats want to curb corporate homebuyers—but it may not make houses easier to buy
summary: Proposed restrictions on large corporate homebuyers could affect less than 1% of total U.S. home sales, limiting their impact on overall housing affordability.
